title: UI Blueprint Project
description: A reference-based multi-screen project. Lists member single-screen Blueprint files by relative path, declares a navigation graph between them, names an entry screen, and optionally carries a project-level shared design system. Member .ui.json files remain fully valid standalone Blueprints.

$schema.description: Optional path or URL to this JSON Schema. Lets editors provide validation and autocomplete for standalone .aub.project.json files. Ignored by AUB tooling.

version.description: Semantic version of the project schema this document conforms to.

id.description: Unique project identifier (kebab or dot notation, e.g. 'acme-app').

name.description: Human-readable project name shown in editors and exports.

description.description: Optional one-paragraph summary of the product or flow this project describes.

screens.description: Member screens. Each references a single-screen Blueprint file by relative path. At least one required.

entry_screen.description: Screen id (from screens[].id) where the flow starts. MUST match one of the declared screens.

navigation.description: Directed navigation edges between screens. from/to MUST reference declared screen ids.

design_system.description: Optional project-level shared design tokens. Member screens may override these in their own design_system. Free-form object mirroring a Blueprint design_system; not validated field-for-field here.

provenance.description: Optional metadata about how this project document was produced.

id.description: Screen identifier. MUST match the referenced Blueprint's screen.id.

name.description: Optional display name. Defaults to the referenced Blueprint's screen.name.

path.description: Relative path (from the project file) to a single-screen .ui.json or .ui.yaml Blueprint.

from.description: Source screen id (must be a declared screen).

to.description: Destination screen id (must be a declared screen).

interaction_id.description: Optional id of the interaction on the source screen that triggers this navigation.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the edge (e.g. 'Open settings').
